title: RISK: ws.rs line 418 error\!() but no sendback on try_set_nickname Err
description: relay/src/ws.rs line 418: when try_set_nickname fails with Err(e), the error is logged but NO error response is sent to the client on the client_tx channel. The client is left hanging, waiting for a response to its SET_NICKNAME request (which has an id field). The client will eventually time out internally (if it has timeout logic) or hang indefinitely (if it doesn't). This is a critical asymmetry: successful SET_NICKNAME sends a response (line 407), but the error path does not. A solo maintainer investigating 'client hung on set_nickname' will not realize the relay silently swallowed the error. Risk: client hangs on store errors; no error feedback to user.
close_reason: Fixed: added INTERNAL_ERROR (-32603) to rpc_errors; subscription_expiry/register_user errors now send error response and abort auth; all_users error disconnects and returns; try_set_nickname Err branch sends internal error response.
